ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the client registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the client's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Client password */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the client (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garanties" (
  "garanty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garanty */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the garanty */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the garanty */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the garanty */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the garanty (active/inactive) */,
  "garanty_type" TEXT /* Type of garanty (e.g., standard, extended) */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., parts, labor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garanty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garanties_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the product (in months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the payment */,
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_type_id") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment type */,
  "payment_processor" TEXT /* Payment processor used for the payment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_details" (
  "return_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return request */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the return request */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return request */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return request */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_details_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garanty_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garanty claim */,
  "garanty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garanty associated with the claim */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the claim */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garanty_claims_garanty_id FOREIGN KEY ("garanty_id") REFERENCES garanties ("garanty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garanty_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim associated with the expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., parts, labor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garanty_expenses_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES garanty_claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the interaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone, email, chat) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_interactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_performance" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., sales, returns, revenue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "metric_name", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "garanty_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "garanty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garanty associated with the alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., expiration, claim) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., pending, sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garanty_alerts_garanty_id FOREIGN KEY ("garanty_id") REFERENCES garanties ("garanty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code associated with the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_products" (
  "client_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client product assignment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date the product was assigned to the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_products_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the note */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_notes_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
